zh.Buckenham Castle, New Buckenham, Norfolk: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可劍橋大學默里 巴肯哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Clifton於大約1392年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可劍橋大學默里 巴肯哈姆時，她的父親Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron21歲，母親Margaret Howard17歲。她於1407年與Sir John Knyvett在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1447年在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆享年56歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Clifton于大约1392年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可劍橋大學默里 巴肯哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron21岁，母亲Margaret Howard17岁。她于1407年与Sir John Knyvett在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1447年在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆享年56岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Clifton was born about 1392, in New Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron, was 21 and her mother, Margaret Howard, was 17. She married Sir John Knyvett in 1407, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1447, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Buckenham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Clifton est née environ 1392, à New Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Howard, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Knyvett en 1407, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1447, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Clifton um 1392 in New Buckenham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron 21 und ihre Mutter Margaret Howard 17. Sie hat 1407 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England Sir John Knyvett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1447 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Buckenham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Buckenham, Norfolk, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Cliftonが約1392年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクニュー ブクエンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baronは21歳，母Margaret Howardは17歳であった。1407年にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムでSir John Knyvettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1447年にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで56歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Clifton(이)가 대략 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 뉴 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Howard(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1407년 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 Sir John Knyvett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 벅함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Clifton nasceu aproximadamente 1392, em New Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Howard, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Knyvett em 1407, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1447, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Clifton родилась около 1392 г. в местности ню буккенам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Constantine de Clifton 2nd Baron было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Howard, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Knyvett в 1407 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1447 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия.
